n: Book 6, Chapter 3: Secrets of the Stones

steps.t: Lesser watching-stones litter the landscape of western Angmar, especially near Angmarim and Hillman encampments. Corunir believes that the secret of R…
Corunir is at the Hillman-village of Aughaire. With the rubbings Corunir required in hand, you should return to the Ranger with your report.
